description: POST /lambdas/profiles with an empty ids array must 400 (lamb2 #465 amplification-DoS fix rejects both missing and empty ids). NOTE: peer.decentraland.org's deployed runtime lags #465 and still 200s empty ids — golden follows the current SOURCE + DoS intent, which our port matches; the two converge once peer redeploys.

body_json.message: No profile ids were specified. Expected ids:string[] in body

captured_from: lamb2 SOURCE profiles-handler.ts (#465, 2026-06-10) — empty ids -> 400. Peer runtime lags (200 []); we follow source.
